summary: MCQ Answer Validation bug fix verified. All 8 question type validation tests pass. Teacher repository grade filtering works correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ MCQ: correct_answer='C' (letter) + user submits 'Wallet' (text) = CORRECT (10/10 points)
✅ MCQ: correct_answer='C' + user submits 'Bank' (wrong) = INCORRECT (0/10 points)
✅ Number Entry: correct_answer='30' + user submits '30' = CORRECT (10/10)
✅ Teacher Repository: GET /api/teacher/repository?grade=1 filters by grade
critical_code_review_comments: is_answer_correct() function (lines 319-371 in quests.py) properly handles MCQ letter-to-text conversion
Multi-select validation correctly compares sorted arrays of option texts
Number validation uses float() comparison with string fallback
seed_data_creation: Created test_mcq_child_final (child user with grade 1) and MCQ Test Grade1 classroom for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: MCQ validation bug is confirmed FIXED. The is_answer_correct() helper function in /app/backend/routes/quests.py (lines 319-371) properly converts between letter answers (A,B,C,D) stored in correct_answer and option texts submitted by users. Test data created: teacher (test.grade.teacher@example.com), child (test_mcq_child_final), classroom (MCQ Test Grade1 Class c803 with join code G3U2JQ). Student join uses /api/student/join-classroom with 'code' field.

rca_of_the_issue.original_issue: Child's correct MCQ answer marked wrong - user submits 'Wallet' but correct_answer stored as 'C'
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Missing conversion between letter (A,B,C,D) and option text formats in answer validation
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Added is_answer_correct() helper function that maps correct_answer letter to option index and compares with user's submitted option text
rca_of_the_issue.verification: 8/8 question type validation tests pass including MCQ, multi-select, true/false, and number entry
